mapper.select: SELECT f.faq_no AS faqNo, f.cs_cate_no AS csCateNo, f.writer_no AS writerNo, f.title, f.content, f.hit, f.reg_date AS regDate, f.update_date AS updateDate, c1.cate_name AS cateName, c2.cate_name AS parentCateName FROM faq f JOIN cs_category c1 ON f.cs_cate_no = c1.cs_cate_no LEFT JOIN cs_category c2 ON c1.parent_no = c2.cs_cate_no ORDER BY f.faq_no DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO faq(cs_cate_no, writer_no, title, content, hit, reg_date) VALUES(#{csCateNo}, COALESCE(#{writerNo}, 1), #{title}, #{content}, 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE faq SET cs_cate_no=#{csCateNo}, writer_no=#{writerNo}, title=#{title}, content=#{content}, hit=#{hit}, update_date=NOW() WHERE faq_no=#{faqNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM faq f JOIN cs_category c ON f.cs_cate_no = c.cs_cate_no WHERE c.parent_no = #{parentNo}

SELECT f.faq_no AS faqNo, f.cs_cate_no AS csCateNo, f.writer_no AS writerNo, f.title, f.content, f.hit, f.reg_date AS regDate, f.update_date AS updateDate, c1.cate_name AS cateName, c2.cate_name AS parentCateName FROM faq f JOIN cs_category c1 ON f.cs_cate_no = c1.cs_cate_no LEFT JOIN cs_category c2 ON c1.parent_no = c2.cs_cate_no ORDER BY f.faq_no DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT f.faq_no AS faqNo, f.cs_cate_no AS csCateNo, f.writer_no AS writerNo, f.title, f.content, f.hit, f.reg_date AS regDate, f.update_date AS updateDate, c.cate_name AS cateName FROM faq f JOIN cs_category c ON f.cs_cate_no = c.cs_cate_no WHERE c.parent_no = #{parentNo} ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, f.faq_no DESC
